name: Thai Spring Rolls
recipeIngredient: 4 oz tempura powder - mixed with water
recipeInstructions:
1. Shred the cabbage, carrots, and celery.
2. In a large wok over low heat, add the shredded vegetables. Stir-fry several times until the cabbage begins to soften.
3. Add the minced chicken breast, sliced mushrooms, oyster sauce, salt, pepper, and the mixed tempura powder (with water) to the wok. Toss well until all ingredients are combined.
4. Allow the mixture to cool to room temperature.
5. To assemble the spring rolls:
a. Place 2 oz of the filling on one corner end of a spring roll skin.
b. Fold the bottom forward and over the top, then roll up one full turn.
c. Tuck the sides in while rolling forward, continuing to roll until sealed.
d. Brush the tip of the skin with tempura mix to seal it closed.
6. Heat vegetable oil in a deep pan or pot to 350°F (175°C).
7. Place several spring rolls in the hot oil and fry until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes.
8. Serve with your favorite sauces.
Recipe By: Sweeney
